description_long: This modern bungalow is enclosed within a rectangular walled lot, featuring a single-story flat-roofed structure with clean, minimalist lines. The front of the house opens to a covered patio with outdoor seating and a dining area, seamlessly connecting to a wooden deck and a rectangular swimming pool. The property is landscaped with palm trees and manicured shrubs, and a paved driveway leads to a parking area with two cars and a row of tall, slender trees for privacy. The building's exterior is finished in light gray, with large glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light to the interior. The backyard is open and spacious, with a mix of greenery and hardscape, while the overall layout emphasizes open-plan living and outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a covered patio, pool, and landscaped yard within a walled lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered patio, main entrance, and landscaped yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the pool, wooden deck, driveway, and two parked cars.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the row of tall trees, driveway, and the solid wall enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the pool, wooden deck, and the open backyard area with palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass panels and grouped side windows
